purpose: AgBH monochromaticity QC config for downstream Aramis data selection; not for autonomous diagnosis.

provenance.notebook_role: AgBH calibration review notebook that computes monochromaticity shoulder metric, detector-distance/q-range eligibility, accepted AgBH days, and reference calibrant-thickness metadata.
generation_summary: Load AgBH calibration H5/session data and associated PONI metadata.
Run azimuthal integration with npt=100 over q=2..23 nm^-1.
Compute AgBH monochromaticity shoulder metric using configured beta-ratio and half-width.
Keep days with score <= parameters.max_score and detector distance compatible with required product q-range.
Record accepted dates, rejected dates, reference AgBH rows, and calibrant-thickness policy.
provenance.reproducibility_note: Regenerate this file only through the referenced Aramis preprocessing notebook or an equivalent scripted export, then update this provenance block and rerun Aramis tests/notebook checks.
provenance.clinical_safety_note: This configuration is for research draft decision-support preprocessing only; it is not clinical validation and not for autonomous diagnosis.

product_distance_q_range_policy.reason: Aramis product preprocessing requires detector distance short enough to provide q-range coverage above 20 nm^-1. Batch 7 distance is used as the current acceptable reference; longer-distance AgBH days are excluded before downstream measurement selection.

selection.measurement_mapping_policy: Prefer explicit linked AgBH/session ID if present in product H5; otherwise use calibration-day date filter.
